purpose: Prove the old icefall Conformer phone-CTC reference path is repeatable on a compatible non-Blackwell GPU and that epoch-based resume works as expected.
success_signal: fresh run writes epoch-1.pt after logging real optimizer steps
resume run loads epoch-1.pt and writes epoch-2.pt
the combined logs show train and validation loss for more than one epoch without hand-editing the environment between runs
stop_conditions: import or startup failure from torch, k2, or data paths
no epoch checkpoint is written by the fresh run
resume path fails to load epoch-1.pt
repeated OOM after one reduced-load retry
no recoverable output written to the output directory
monitoring_cadence: Poll the remote job every 2 minutes until the fresh run writes epoch-1.pt, then start the resume command and poll every 2 minutes again until epoch-2.pt or a terminal failure is visible.
next_action_if_pass: Mark R2 green and move the local Blackwell canonical lane to the first structured encoder experiment plus resume validation.
next_action_if_fail: Fix the concrete reference-lane rerun or resume blocker before spending more time on rented or hosted GPUs.
